society.hospital_receipt.title: Recibo del hospital
society.hospital_receipt.author: Hospital de Sunlit Valley
society.hospital_receipt.first_death:
Hospital de Sunlit Valley 

Bienvenido al hospital Sunlit Valley! Alguien del pueblo te encontró en apuros y te trajo a urgencias, ¡estabas insconsciente! Normalmente cobramos una pequeña factura por el tratamiento médico pero como es tu primera vez, ¡ésta corre de nuestra cuenta y no te cobraremos nada!

¡Ten cuidado la próxima vez!
society.hospital_receipt.fee_taked:
Sunlit Valley Hospital

Looks like you passed out again! We've treated you for a small fee.

We've taken it out of your bank account for convenience. Be careful next time!

:coin: %s paid.[EN]
society.hospital_receipt.debt:
Sunlit Valley Hospital

Looks like you passed out again! You didn't have enough in your bank account to cover the fee, so we'll take :coin: %s out of your profits until the fee is paid off. Be careful next time!

Debt: :coin: %s[EN]

society.skull_cavern.intro.note.author: someone...[EN]
society.skull_cavern.intro.note:
The Skull Cavern is a dangerous pit you can descend by finding ropes under ores and boulders.

It'll drain the life out of you if you stay in it too late.

Use that Escape Rope I gave you to get out before 5AM...[EN]

society.npc.gifted_too_soon: You've already given this person a gift in the last 4 days[EN]
society.ender_eye.no_end: The End does not seem to exist in Sunlit Valley...[EN]
society.endless_entrana.text.3: It would be dangerous to go any further...[EN]
society.endless_entrana.text.5: On April 14th, 1912, the famous ocean liner known as the Titanic crashed into an iceberg. After remaining afloat for two hours and forty minutes, it sank beneath the waters of the North Atlantic. I will give you more time. Nine Hours. That is the time you will be given to make your escape.[EN]
society.endless_entrana.text.6: You have a long road ahead...[EN]
society.endless_entrana.text.7: But there's a prize at the end[EN]
society.endless_entrana.text.8: There's more where that came from![EN]
society.endless_entrana.text.9: Unlimited money comes to those that smoke Entrana Greens...[EN]
society.endless_entrana.text.10: Place a Prismatic Coin in your offhand as an offering while smoking... Maybe it will be recognized...[EN]
society.starting_item_sharestone.title: Server Welcome[EN]
society.starting_item_sharestone.author: Society[EN]
society.starting_item_sharestone.text:
Welcome!

Thanks for taking part in a Sunlit Valley Multiplayer Server! You've been given a White Sharestone to make traveling to other bases easier. Please be sure to claim your base before placing it![EN]

Shift + Right Click with an empty hand to take one out[EN]

block.society.fish_pond.pond_is_empty: This Fish Pond is Empty! Right click with a fish to place it in the pond.[EN]
block.society.fish_pond.cross_type_fish: 🔔: We don't like that fish here...[EN]
block.society.fish_pond.fish_quest: 🔔: We'd feel more at home with %s of these:[EN]
block.society.fish_pond.fish_quest.compl: 🔔: This really makes us feel at home![EN]
block.society.fish_pond.fish_quest.parti: 🔔: Thanks but we need %s more of these to be happy...[EN]
block.society.fish_pond.no_alt: 🔔: We won't change our mind on this one![EN]
block.society.fish_pond.fish_quest_chang: 🔔: Fine sure! We'll take %s of these:[EN]
block.society.fish_pond.fishing_rod: Right click with a fishing rod to clear fish type.[EN]
block.society.fish_pond.not_valid: Not a valid Fish pond! Requires a 3x4 pond behind it without adjacent Fish Ponds to work. Nether fish need a lava pond.[EN]
block.society.fish_smoker.description: Smokes a fish over a long period of time[EN]
block.society.golden_clock.description: Progresses nearby Artisan Machines once a day at 7am[EN]
block.society.iridium_clock.description: Produces Spinel every day. The amount it produces increases by 1 for every day it hasn't been moved.[EN]
block.society.iridium_clock.area: Has a 1% chance to turn outputs pristine for every golden clock in its 3x3x3 area.[EN]
block.society.mana_clock.description: Advances Aging Casks and Ancient Casks that have no progress by 1 day[EN]
block.society.preserves_jar.description: Turns 5 of the same crop into a preserve[EN]
block.society.prize_machine.description: Redeem Prize Tickets for a reward![EN]
block.society.mushroom_log.description: Grows mushroom based off of nearby trees and large mushrooms.[EN]
block.society.seed_maker.description: Turns 3 of the same crop into seeds[EN]
block.society.sparkstone_recycler.descri: 10% chance to refund sparkstone of attached machine[EN]
Compatible Machines: Artisan Hopper, Mini Artisan Hopper, Auto-Grabber, Fish Pond Basket[EN]
block.society.tapper.description: Place on tree to tap for resources[EN]
block.society.tapper.too_many_tapper: Too many Tappers attached to this log![EN]
block.society.tapper.invalid_block: This block cannot be tapped for resources![EN]
block.society.wine_keg.description: Turns 3 of the same crop into wine[EN]
block.society.artisan_hopper.description:
Inserts items into Artisan Machines from inventory above.
Harvests outputs from Artisan Machines into inventory below.[EN]
Requires Sparkstone for each insert and extract[EN]
block.society.auto_grabber.description: Harvests Milk and Special items from Farm Animals into inventory below.[EN]
block.society.auto_grabber.description.u: Upgrade with Magic Shears to collect drops.[EN]
block.society.auto_petter.description: Pets husbandry animals in its radius at 6am for half the affection gain.[EN]
block.society.auto_tapper.description:
Collects Tapper resources automatically.
Tapped fluid in its tank must be pumped out.[EN]
block.society.auto_worm_farm.description: Cultivates worms without any inputs every 60 seconds[EN]
block.society.feeding_trough.description: Feeds nearby farm animals using Animal Feed[EN]
block.society.fish_pond_basket.descripti: Harvests outputs of Fish Ponds into inventory below.[EN]
Upgrade with a Bucket to extract fish when mature.[EN]
block.society.growth_obelisk.description: Grows crops by one stage once a day at 7am[EN]
block.society.juice_inserter.description:
Inserts juice fluids into Fermenting Barrels.
Fluids must be pumped directly into its tank.[EN]
block.society.mana_sprinkler.description: Sends mana to nearby Mana Fruit and keeps the farmland in the same area moist.[EN]
block.society.mana_sprinkler.need_mana: Requires Botania mana from spreader, but keeps farmland moist without the need for mana.[EN]
block.society.prickly_can.description: Pickles vegetables automatically and inserts them into the block below[EN]
block.society.prickly_can.description.wa: Requires adjacent Salt Layers from an Evaporator[EN]
block.society.quality_washer.description: Removes Quality from items and inserts them into the block below[EN]
block.society.ribbit_hut.description:
Creates a hut in a 3x3x3 space centered around it.
Ribbits will collect crops at 7am every morning.[EN]
block.society.ribbit_hut.not_enough_room: Not enough room to place ribbit hut![EN]
block.society.ribbit_hut.break: Break the door to demolish the Ribbit Hut[EN]
block.society.roe_recycler.description:
Turns roe into non-roe drops and inserts them into the block below.
Operates at a random population per operation at half the chance.[EN]
block.society.shipping_bin_monitor.descr:
Displays sell value of Shipping Bin below it with all bonuses applied. Updates every 10 seconds.
Right click to manually update[EN]
block.society.snow_melter.description: Melts snow layers and ice in an area[EN]
block.society.gnome.description:
Right click to toggle poses
Right click with lantern to create a light source[EN]
block.society.lantern_gnome.description: Right click a Gnome with a lantern to create[EN]
block.society.truffle_tea.description:
It's said to promote relaxation.
What do you have to lose?[EN]
block.society.supreme_mayonnaise.descrip: Created by the Mayonnaise Machine upgrade: Enkephalin[EN]
block.society.moon_statue.description: Provides a random mining buff once a day when clicked[EN]
block.society.moon_statue.moon_rope_reve: Mining Boulders have a chance to reveal the location of nearby Ropes.[EN]
block.society.moon_statue.moon_remains: Chance to find ancient remains in ore[EN]
block.society.moon_statue.moon_damage: Chance to deal 100 damage to mobs in the Skull Cavern when attacking.[EN]
block.society.moon_statue.no_mastery: You need to have Mining Mastery unlocked to use this...[EN]
block.society.moon_statue.already_taken: You've already received a blessing today.[EN]
block.society.villager_home.description:
Transports the villager to your town and assigns them the nearby area as their home.
 Cannot be placed near other villagers.[EN]
